modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need assistance with setting up Respondus LockDown Browser in D2L.

full_description_text: I'm trying to set up the Respondus LockDown Browser for an exam in D2L. I need help with the setup process because I'm not sure how to do it correctly. It's important for me to get this done before the exam, so any guidance would be appreciated.
